name: Javanese Peanut Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Cucumber, halved, seeded, and thinly sliced
1 red pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add dried pepper flakes and cook for 1 minute.
3. Remove from heat and add chopped scallions; stir briefly.
4. Stir in brown sugar, rice wine vinegar, sesame oil, soy sauce, ginger, and garlic.
5. Return pan to low heat and gradually add peanut butter, stirring constantly.
6. Add chicken broth and continue stirring until hot.
7. Place cooked fettuccine in a large shallow bowl.
8. Pour the peanut sauce over and toss to combine.
9. Sprinkle with toasted peanuts and sliced scallions.
10. Arrange cucumber slices in concentric circles around the pasta.
11. Arrange red pepper strips to radiate from the center.
12. Sprinkle coconut in the middle of the dish.
13. Serve immediately. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
